Our Products

Industrial Ventilation Systems

Engineered for performance, built to last. All products manufactured in galvanised steel with customisable dimensions.

Fixed Blade
Louver Ventilator

Multi-panel fixed blade louvre system for wall-mounted ventilation in factories, plants, and warehouses. Available in single and multi-panel (c1/c2/c3) configurations with optional bird mesh.

Wind-Driven
Turbo Roof Ventilator

Self-driven turbine ventilator that operates without electricity. Turbine blades capture wind from any direction to continuously extract hot and stale air through the roof flashing.

Product Detail

Louver Ventilator

Fixed blade louvre systems for wall-mounted industrial ventilation. Modular, configurable, and built from galvanised steel.

Parameter Detail
MaterialGalvanised Iron (GI) Steel
Panel ConfigurationSingle panel or multi-panel (2–3 panels: c1/c2/c3)
Blade TypeFixed blade (standard) / CorkScrewed blade
Bird MeshOptional — integrated wire mesh on inner face
Dimension: Width (a)Customisable — specify at order
Dimension: Height (b)Customisable — specify at order
Depth (x)Standard depth per blade pitch
FixingBolt-in frame; flange mount available
FinishGalvanised (hot-dip); powder coat on request
ApplicationFactory walls, plant rooms, warehouse sidewalls
🔧
Modular Panels

Available in 1, 2 or 3-panel configurations (c1/c2/c3 or d1/d2/d3) to cover any opening width without complex custom fabrication.

🐦
Bird Mesh Protection

Integrated wire mesh option prevents bird and debris ingress. Suitable for food-grade, pharma, and clean environments.

🏭
GI Steel Construction

Hot-dip galvanised steel provides long-term corrosion resistance in humid and chemically active industrial environments.

📐
Custom Dimensions

All dimensions (a, b, x, y) can be specified to suit your opening. Blade pitch and frame depth adjustable per project requirement.

💨
High Airflow Efficiency

Fixed blade geometry optimised for natural ventilation airflow, rain defence, and minimal pressure drop across the louvre face.

⚡
No Moving Parts

Passive ventilation system with zero maintenance requirements. No motors, actuators, or electrical connections needed.

Product Detail

Turbo Roof Ventilator

Self-driven turbine ventilators for continuous roof-level ventilation. No electricity, no maintenance — just airflow.

Annotated diagram showing all key components of the Turbo Roof Ventilator assembly.

Top CapProtects bearing
Turbine BladesOmni-directional
Air OutletHot air exhaust
BaseConnects to flashing
FlashingWatertight roof seal
Air InletFresh air entry
ParameterDetail
MaterialGalvanised Iron (GI) Steel
DriveWind-powered — zero electricity required
ComponentsTop cap, turbine blades, base, flashing
MountingRoof-mount via integrated flashing plate
Wind DirectionOmni-directional — captures wind from any angle
ApplicationFactories, warehouses, industrial sheds, poultry
Sizes AvailableMultiple diameters — specify on enquiry
SealWatertight flashing prevents rain ingress
MaintenanceMinimal — self-lubricating bearing at top cap
FinishGalvanised steel; powder coat on request
🌬️
Zero Electricity

Turbine blades are spun entirely by wind energy. No wiring, no running costs, no power outage risk — runs 24/7 as long as wind flows.

🔄
Omni-Directional

Designed to capture wind from any compass direction. The turbine self-orients to extract maximum airflow regardless of wind angle.

🌧️
Weatherproof Flashing

The base flashing creates a watertight seal on the roof sheet, preventing rain ingress even in heavy monsoon conditions.

🔩
Simple Installation

Mounts directly to roof sheeting via flashing plate. No structural modifications required for standard industrial roof profiles.

🌡️
Heat Extraction

Continuously removes hot air that accumulates at roof level, reducing internal temperatures and improving working conditions.

🏗️
GI Steel Build

Full galvanised steel construction provides excellent durability in outdoor rooftop environments with UV, moisture, and heat exposure.
